name: apex_devour_evolution_engine
description: APEX 吞噬自进化引擎：从高星开源 Agentic RL / coding-agent / self-improvement 项目抽取机制，经过 APEX 公式门控、重写、审计和证据归档后内化为 CLAW/Hermes 原生能力。

source_digest.mechanism: SDK/CLI/GUI/Cloud software-agent stack; scalable agent execution
source_digest.gate: task flow and execution log exist

source_digest.mechanism: GitHub issue -> patch -> test loop; SWE-bench oriented environment
automatic curriculum, ever-growing skill library, iterative prompting
source_digest.gate: skills reusable across tasks and curriculum difficulty increases

source_digest.mechanism: verbal reinforcement learning via reflection memory
source_digest.gate: failure reflection changes next attempt policy

devour_gain_conservative.note: A_impl remains low because this cycle created the governing skill/gene but did not yet implement Rust/Go/C core. Therefore gain is conservatively not claimed as positive.

truth_gate.claim_boundary: Skill/gene enabled; CLAW core Rust/Go/C implementation is not yet completed in this cycle.
